description: Conteo de eventos y cálculo de EPS por dominio de cliente
aql: SELECT DOMAINNAME(domainid) AS metric, LONG(COUNT(*)) AS value FROM events GROUP BY domainid

description: Resumen detallado de eventos por tipo y nombre de fuente de log
aql: SELECT LOGSOURCETYPENAME(devicetype) AS log_type, LOGSOURCENAME(logsourceid) AS log_name, SUM(eventcount) AS total, DOMAINNAME(domainid) AS client FROM events WHERE (log_type <> 'Health Metrics' AND log_type <> 'SIM Audit') AND log_type <> 'System Notification' GROUP BY logsourceid, domainid, devicetype ORDER BY total DESC
